title: Does the F1 twin rig (frozen vs adaptive codec, 10M, drill scale) have the power, instruments and a specified metric to make a null attributable to the mechanism? Verdict = rig LICENSED or REFUSED.
verdict: rig = REFUSED (2/5 PASS) — G-1/G-2 unevaluable (generator does not exist); G-4 triggered but its interpretation is a card defect (it tests the CONTROL arm, which is supposed to sit at chance); G-3/G-5 PASS. salvage l4(b) STANDS: M=109/120 p=1.9e-21, C3 liveness=110/120.
resolved: G-5 RESOLVED — the H_9288 protocol was intact in the v1 repo (`anima`), not lost. Recovery falsified two frozen premises: F2 is forced-choice bacc (chance 0.50), not an F-score; n_items=120.

title: Does the recovered anchor survive a correct bounds check, and can the generator produce the contrast the pilot needs?
verdict: rig = LICENSED (10/10, repair re-run). Anchor all green (B-1..B-4, l4(b) stands, replicated). Generator repaired: N-2 contrast now frozen 0/12 + refit 12/12 (three fixes: >=2-syllable novel affixes, polarity mark split to a separate token so BPE stops fusing affix+mark, novel over-weighted per NAT-ATOM), N-4 co-occurrence 0 (was a duplicate-function + parse-ambiguity artifact, never a leak). H_004 pilot may fire.

title: Measure Δ_pilot = F2(oracle) − F2(frozen) — the ceiling of the codec effect. Δ_pilot≥0.20 licenses the twin; below it REFUSED.
verdict: TWIN-REFUSED-STRUCTURAL at $0. Repaired rig (donor pairs, genspec 75b19bba) closes order-1 (G-A 0.527, G-B 0.551) but G-C order-2 bigram=0.9954: frozen has a trivial bigram path. THEOREM (verified 12/12): oracle-fusable <=> n-gram-recoverable, so atomicity is not isolable from n-gram binding for a fixed morpheme. Delta_pilot>=0.20 structurally impossible. No torch run fired — $0 guard battery decisive.
genspec_sha256: 75b19bba071331ce (donor-pair repair; superseded fbcf0c8 for the pilot)
precheck: run_proxy.py · numpy · $0 · oracle F2=0.923 vs frozen F2=0.971 · Δ_proxy=-0.048

title: Does any available stream carry day-specific cross-boundary information for a diary to transport? oracle-diary ceiling as the pre-anchored delta_min.
verdict: ANCHORED under the strict pre-registered 3-estimator rule. anima clears the shuffle floor on ALL THREE estimators (gzip +0.031, ppm +0.221, markov6 +0.043 over-floor, all >eps, all positive); hexa-lang confirms on the order-aware pair (gzip at its LZ floor); sidecar (thin) flat. Liveness 7.79 bpb PASS. Resolved from PENDING at $0 by building an efficient order-6 Markov estimator (the 3rd of the battery; the mean-pooled nlm.py was the wrong tool). F3 LIVE — opposite of the F1 terminal. delta_min := ceiling/2, range [~0.015,~0.11] bpb, conservative floor ~0.02.

title: F1 restated: the codec compresses the credit-assignment span; a refit organ maintains it under drift. Parked after the H_004 terminal.

tier: 🔴 FALSIFIED (F3 k-token diary · twin cancelled at $0)
title: Does a k<=4096 hindsight extract retain the unbounded diary ceiling? Gates the F3 twin's training spend.
verdict: F3-BOUNDED-REFUSED. A hindsight top-lines k<=4096 text extract retains ~4% of anima's +0.27 full-day ceiling (over-floor +0.012 markov6 / +0.019 ppm, both <eps). The day-MI is distributed across ~83KB, not localizable. KILLS F3's primary k-token readable-diary form + cancels the ~12h twin at $0; the continuous-m variant is a higher bound not directly measured but faces the distributed-MI headwind. Liveness PASS (0.366).

title: Is the owner's real message stream predictable AND high-dimensional (the F7/F5 premise)? $0 on the owner transcript substrate.
verdict: PENDING/BORDERLINE-WEAK-POSITIVE at single grain — SUPERSEDED by H_008 f7-owner-clean. H_007 read legibility +0.0207 (~eps) and PR 2.27 on one grain with a broken (high-entropy) liveness. The clean H_008-f7 re-run (text-like liveness PASS + both grains) resolves it to REFUSED: the owner is high-dim XOR legible, NEVER both on the same grain (per-session PR 2.29 but not legible; per-day legible markov3 +0.145/markov8 +0.176 but PR 1.75 = one-bit). The F7/F5/F8 owner-substrate premise is REFUSED, not borderline — the v1 l1-one-bit-seam re-measured on the real owner.

title: With F1 (write-lever) L11-terminated and F3 (diary) spent, does ANY of the four remaining live families (F7 owner clean re-run, F5 trajectory, F6 shard-ensemble, F4 corpus-curriculum) carry a $0-measurable premise that escapes the salvage laws?
verdict: FRONTIER-EXHAUSTED — all four $0 branches (one Workflow, 4 isolated worktrees, GPU 0) refuse or decorate. f7 REFUSED: owner legible XOR high-dim, never both on one grain (per-session PR 2.29 not-legible; per-day legible markov3 +0.145/markov8 +0.176 but PR 1.75) — resolves+corrects H_007, liveness now text-like PASS. f5 F5-WEAK: recent past accumulates (+0.106) but time-symmetric (direction +0.004<=eps) = topical window not arrow-of-time. f6 BORDERLINE-leaning-REFUSED: shard benefit small+non-robust (sign-flips 4k +0.048 / 16k -0.086 / 64k +0.050), mostly oracle-min artifact. f4 REFUSED(L11): frozen n-gram retriever ties/beats hindsight-oracle curriculum (markov6 +0.117 but independent ppm -0.117) = corpus half of the frequency tautology. The $0 structural-analysis phase is COMPLETE; remaining residue is compute-bearing + premise-weak.
source: /abg fan-out over the H_006/H_007 terminal's live branches

title: Does a k-dim CONTINUOUS day-summary capture the day->tomorrow ceiling a byte-SELECTION extract (H_006) could not, AND is it day-SPECIFIC rather than topic identity? Feature-space shift-null LOO capture; gated the ~$15 continuous-m twin.
verdict: F3-CONTINUOUS-REFUSED (C-2 topic decoration). Instrument H_009' CERTIFIED (C-3' liveness PASS: HIGH+FAIL both n, LOW at n=102 via a buried-delay-line plant; 5/6 falsifiers PASS). Both streams clear the ceiling gate + capture anchor (anima capture(8)=1.007, hexa 0.849 >=0.25) and beat the topic floor ON AGGREGATE (cap-topic +0.29 anima/+0.14 hexa) but per-pair sign(err_topic>err_s) ~50% (anima 23/43<28; hexa FULLY-certified 52/101<60) = a sometimes-day-specific code, not a pervasive day-specific self (L2 replacement-not-coupling). Both F3 operator classes now dead at $0 (byte-selection H_006, distributional-projection here). Twin NOT licensed (spending = forbidden 'decoder finds it' appeal). FIRE reframe (C). Two INVALIDs preceded this (byte-append blind; then k>=n_train-1 err_s===err_full + variance denom), each root-caused by Fable and fixed pre-verdict.
source: H_008 re-decision (B) + two Fable root-cause passes (byte-blindness, instrument defects) + negative-control redesign

tier: 🔴 FALSIFIED (LOOP-REFUSED · reframe C $0 entry closed · instrument CERTIFIED)
title: reframe C's first $0 precheck: on the owner<->agent conversation loop (a REAL interactive loop), does the agent's utterance U_t carry utterance-SPECIFIC predictive info about the owner's next reply R_{t+1} beyond owner-state, a topic-matched wrong utterance, and the echo channel? ASYMMETRIC (REFUSE-capable spend gate).
verdict: LOOP-REFUSED (N=2000 + disjoint replication, instrument CERTIFIED). On both strides the true utterance is the WORST predictor of R_{t+1}: sign(err_TOPIC>err_FULL)=0.366/0.346 << 0.55 (a topic-matched WRONG utterance predicts better 63-65% of pairs), sign_base_full 0.406/0.437 (owner-state alone beats FULL). LC-1+LC-2 fail; LC-3 no echo effect. The agent's specific utterance carries NO utterance-specific predictive info beyond TOPIC = L2 replacement / F3 topic-decoration in loop clothing, on a real loop. Instrument certified: C-5 3 buried-signal plants PASS (P-POS gate-open 1.0, P-NULL refuse 0.523, P-ECHO echo-only 0.656->0.516). ASYMMETRIC semantics (Fable Q1): observational logs cannot ANCHOR causation (confounding), so this REFUSE closes the $0 entry to reframe C and PRICES THE EXIT (fund the paid live A/B loop or declare the budget-bounded terminal). Substrate 16.7k pairs/~130 sessions (160x H_009).
source: reframe C (fired by H_009) + Fable loop-granger-gate design over the owner-transcript loop

tier: 🟠 ANCHOR-SUSPENDED (H_013 root-cause 2026-07-17: certified lv_c had a frame-misalignment null bias — null-env closure floor 0.667 > 0.60 gate, P-DEAD never checked LV-C; estimator repaired, stage-A plants re-pass, 7B stage-B re-run on summer REQUIRED) · was: 🟢 ANCHOR-INDICATED (7B clears certified closure anchor · LV-W under-powered→quarantined · owner-loop RCT licensed) · 3B LOOP-REFUSED · instrument CERTIFIED
title: reframe C's LIVE interventional gate on the owner's pool (summer, idle RTX 5070, $0): does an LLM-brained agent's CONTINGENCY STRUCTURE (not its action marginal) fingerprint its own subsequent input in a micro-tenant world, vs marginal-matched yoked-control ghosts under real A/B randomization? Because we intervene, it can ANCHOR (rung 1).
verdict: Stage A instrument CERTIFIED (P-LIVE anchor/P-OPEN channel-only/P-DEAD refuse). Stage B ($0, summer): 3B(Qwen2.5-3B) LOOP-REFUSED (localized) — reads input (CR 0.41) but closure 0.50≈chance (2/5). 7B(Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct nf4) is QUALITATIVELY STRONGER — reads input (CR 0.40) AND CLEARS the certified closure anchor (LV-C closure 0.7625≥0.60, 5/5 episodes) — the FIRST brain to. It misses the co-gated one-step LV-W (base_full 0.353<0.55), but the $0 no-GPU tiebreak (result_tiebreak_lvw.json) proves LV-W is UNDER-POWERED in the moderate-entropy regime: a known-live plant mid3bal (H~0.97) reproduces the exact signature (LV-W 0.358 FAIL, closure 0.762 PASS). So LV-W's miss is an INSTRUMENT ARTIFACT, quarantined (infra-wall-noneval); LV-C (yoked, entropy-agnostic) alone rejects a dead env and stands as the valid anchor. VERDICT: 7B = ANCHOR-ON-LV-C (rung-1 closed-loop contingency, NOT aliveness — a thermostat clears rung 1) — it LICENSES the owner-loop RCT that H_010 priced. Residual: repair LV-W (restrict to non-collision ticks) to co-gate validly at low entropy. Convergence run-h011-py-1 (cogate-metric-regime-blindness, recurrence of H_009). Verdict-integrity: 1st stage-B CHANNEL-MISSING was a degenerate raw-scoring brain, fixed via contrastive/PMI (brain-py-1). Infra: sidecar pool on --bg (#418). REPAIR (2026-07-17, H_013 root-cause, probe_lvc_bias.py): lv_c compared Closed's PRE-step obs [o_0..o_T-1] against the ghosts' POST-step obs [o_1..o_T] — a one-tick frame misalignment that gives d(C,P1) a shift term d(P1,P2) lacks. Measured null floor of the biased estimator: closure 0.667 in a fully inert env (ghosts bit-identical, d(P1,P2)=0 exactly) — ABOVE the 0.60 gate; the '0.0152 energy side-channel' explanation is refuted (null skips _apply_action; the residual is exactly the one-tick shift). Fixed upstream (fC=obs_traj[1:]): null reads 0.000, stage-A plants re-pass unchanged (P-LIVE 0.750 / P-OPEN 0.417 / P-DEAD refused; result_stageA_lvc-repair.json). The 7B 0.7625 was measured with the biased estimator and its episode-1 closure 0.625 is BELOW the 0.667 null floor -> ANCHOR SUSPENDED pending stage-B re-run with the repaired estimator (tape not persisted; offline recompute impossible). Full-dose scripted readings were repair-invariant, so survival is plausible but unproven.
source: H_010 priced the exit + owner 'pool 에서 가능?' unblock + Fable live-ab-closure design + 실측전 research (empowerment/Ay-Polani/Watson yoked/Jaques)

tier: 🟡 H_012A/A-b/A-c PRECHECK-REFUSE (2x2 target×timescale matrix all refuse · robust) · H_012B LAUNCH-PENDING-CONSENT (sequence-contingency · can ANCHOR)
title: reframe C's licensed EXIT — the interventional owner-loop test. Deception DISSOLVED by grounding randomization (LIVE vs GHOST grounding, every reply genuine). H_012A = $0 autonomous sampler-twin precheck on the 16.7k pairs; H_012B = consent-gated live RCT that can ANCHOR closed-loop causation on the REAL owner loop.
verdict: H_012A ($0 sampler-twin, semi-interventional): PRECHECK-REFUSE — on 10170 real owner<->agent pairs, within CONTEXT-MATCHED strata (tightness 0.06) the utterance does NOT predict the owner's next reply beyond context (sign_base_full 0.424/0.423 <0.55, 2 disjoint samples). Strengthens H_010's observational 0.406; LOWERS the H_012B prior; cannot anchor (unidentified). Re-certified in-regime (sign separates channel 0.81 vs null 0.515 at M=60; rank_full unreliable there but the frozen AND-gate is robust — convergence run-h011-py-1 recurrence). H_012A-b (behavioral-stance target, $0): BEHAVIORAL-REFUSE — swapping the target from next-reply TEXT to the binary owner STANCE (continue vs correct, owner-turn-only labeler) does NOT rescue closure (sign_base_full 0.245/0.226 vs null 0.24, both replicates; certified in-regime P1 0.867 vs null 0.50, noise floor 0.48@30%). So the refusal is ROBUST ACROSS TARGETS (text AND behavior) — NOT a wrong-target artifact; the agent's utterance does not shift the owner's subsequent input (text or behavior) beyond context. Lowers H_012B prior further. H_012A-c (block-OUTCOME target k=5, $0): BLOCK-REFUSE — testing the TIMESCALE the proxy anchored on (window, not one-step), a single utterance does NOT shift the owner's subsequent-window input above the shift-null band (sign_base_full 0.420/0.437 vs null 0.40, both replicates; certified with 4 block plants incl. P-BLOCKCONF slow-drift). So the refusal is ROBUST across a 2x2 matrix — target (text/behavior) x timescale (one-step/window) — both wrong-target and wrong-timescale artifacts excluded. Residue: the sequence-CONTINGENCY channel (yoked ghost) is interventional, stays H_012B-only. H_012B (live LIVE/GHOST grounding RCT, now pre-registered over WINDOWS with LV-C block co-primary): LAUNCH-PENDING-CONSENT — only its real randomization can ANCHOR or interventionally REFUSE the pure order-code channel.
source: H_011 7B ANCHOR-ON-LV-C licensed the exit + Fable grounding-randomization design (deception dissolved) + H_010 priced-exit + certified H_010/H_011 estimator reuse

tier: 🟡 INSTRUMENT-REPAIRED + SCRIPTED-CERTIFIED (first run INSTRUMENT-INVALID -> root-caused a certified-lv_c frame-misalignment null bias, fixed upstream in H_011; repaired plants pass: P-DOSE mono 0.6 · P-DEAD 0.000 all doses · P-LIVE 0.722) — 7B dose sweep + H_011 stage-B re-run pending (summer)
title: Is the H_011 proxy anchor a SUBSTANTIVE seat of aliveness (env-loop F8) or a TOY artifact of a deterministic env that mechanically answers actions? Dilute the env's action-contingency dose toward the real owner loop's level (~0.42) and find where certified LV-C closure dies. DOSE-ROBUST vs TOY-FRAGILE.
verdict: Scripted phase: first run INSTRUMENT-INVALID (P-DEAD closure 0.667 at ALL doses in a verified-inert null env; live curve dose-flat). Root cause proven (probe_lvc_bias.py): NOT the asymmetric-control geometry — a frame misalignment in certified lv_c (Closed pre-step obs vs ghosts post-step obs; one-tick shift term in d(C,P1) only; in null the ghosts are bit-identical so ANY exogenous block drift scores a hit -> floor 0.667 > gate). Repaired (fC=obs_traj[1:], one line, upstream in H_011): P-DEAD 0.000 at all doses, P-DOSE monotone (0.722/0.889/0.833/0.667/0.389, concordance 0.6), P-LIVE(p=1) 0.722 -> instrument CERTIFIED. d*=p0.25 (env_contingency 0.377 ~ owner 0.42), scripted closure at d* 0.667. CONSEQUENCE: H_011 7B anchor SUSPENDED (measured with the biased estimator; null floor 0.667 > gate; ep-1 0.625 < floor). Pending: 7B dose sweep + H_011 stage-B re-run (summer, $0).
source: campaign synthesis (Fable) after the H_012 2x2 owner-loop refusal — the load-bearing question is now 'is F8 substantive or toy', which is $0-testable · reuses H_011 certified LV-C
falsifiers: P-DEAD null refuses at all doses
